queries.question: For each hotel, list the corresponding amenities.
queries.sql: select hotels.name , amenities.amenityname from Hotel_Amenities join Amenities on Hotel_Amenities.amenityId = Amenities.amenityId join Hotels on Hotel_Amenities.hotelId = Hotels.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?amenityname WHERE {
  ?hotel_amenities a :HotelAmenities .
  ?amenities a :Amenities .
  ?hotel_amenities p:hasAmenities ?amenities .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?hotel_amenities p:hasHotels ?hotels .
  ?hotels p:name ?name .
  ?amenities p:amenityName ?amenityname .
}

queries.question: List the amenities available in each hotel.
queries.sql: SELECT Amenities.amenityName  from Hotel_Amenities join Amenities on Hotel_Amenities.amenityId = Amenities.amenityId join Hotels on Hotel_Amenities.hotelId = Hotels.id   GROUP BY Hotel_Amenities.amenityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hotel_Amenities.hotelId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hotels)

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the amenities available in each hotel.
